title: schotia africana
intro: Schotia africana, also known as the karee tree, is a deciduous tree native to southern Africa, characterized by its broad leaves and showy white flowers. The tree has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The leaves and bark of the karee tree have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, providing relief from pain, inflammation, and infection. Herbal preparations of Schotia africana include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and salves for topical application.
